response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in distributed systems, cloud infrastructure, and leadership across multiple roles, including technical mentorship and architecture. However, his C++ experience (2 years at National Instruments) falls short of the required 8 years, and his cloud architecture experience is not explicitly detailed. His leadership in mentoring and project delivery is strong, but gaps in core C++ depth and cloud-specific leadership may require further assessment.
strengths: Extensive leadership experience in technical mentorship and project delivery across multiple companies.
Strong background in distributed systems, microservices, and high-performance computing (DLang, Node.js, C/C++).
Proven ability to drive large-scale projects to completion and establish engineering best practices.
concerns: Insufficient C++ experience (2 years vs. 8 years required).
Limited explicit experience with cloud architecture balancing short- and long-term needs.
No direct mention of DevOps or cloud-specific infrastructure leadership in preferred qualifications.
